card_description: John of Patmos (Hebrew (Yohanan): "God is gracious") is a historical figure appearing in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. In the biblical tradition, John of Patmos is author of revelation; exiled visionary. PKD saw himself as a modern apocalyptic visionary in this tradition. Appears in 4 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick identifies the "Voice" he heard (St."
